summary: Update mode testing completed. Added 7 new frontend tests for loading states, auth redirect, and symptoms sync. All 54 tests pass (30 backend + 24 frontend).
seed_data_creation: Test users prefixed with TEST_ created during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. VITE_API_URL was changed from external preview to localhost for testing. New tests added for: 1) isLoading state in Login/Register pages, 2) Auto-redirect when already authenticated, 3) Symptoms sync from localStorage to backend after login. Backend symptoms API expects mood values: 'good' | 'neutral' | 'bad'.

new_features_tested.login_loading_state: PASS - Shows 'Verificando sesión...' while checking auth
new_features_tested.register_loading_state: PASS - Shows loading while checking auth
new_features_tested.auth_redirect: PASS - Authenticated users on /login redirect to /portal
new_features_tested.symptoms_sync: PASS - localStorage symptoms synced to backend on login
new_features_tested.multiple_symptoms_sync: PASS - Multiple localStorage symptoms are all synced
new_features_tested.empty_localstorage_no_sync: PASS - No sync calls when localStorage is empty

backend_api.auth_register: POST /api/auth/register - new user, duplicate email, validation
backend_api.auth_login: POST /api/auth/login - valid creds, invalid creds, nonexistent email

frontend_e2e.auth_flows: 10 tests - Login, Register, protected routes, loading states

env_changes.VITE_API_URL: Changed from external preview URL to http://localhost:8001/api for local testing
